content.en:
Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian and the Snow Maiden Master came to the Origin Realm outside and faced the countless creatures at the end of the realm.

And at this time, Jin Yu's master's face changed and said: "Why did the Endless Controller come out of the Origin Realm Sea, isn't this looking for death? Only by sticking to the Origin Realm Sea, can he be invincible, and when he comes out of the Origin Realm Sea, how can he beat those terrifying creatures at the level of a half-step perfect controller!"

But then, all the Ten Realm-level controllers were shocked.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's aura began to change.

I saw that Ye Tian broke the boundaries of his will and his body of control in an instant, and stepped into the realm of a half-step perfect controller, and the countless resources on his body were refined by him, and countless energies around him poured into his body.

Ye Tian's body is the same as the copy body, and it can be promoted to the same level as the copy body in a short period of time, it was suppressed before, but now it does not need to be suppressed.

Of course.

If Ye Tian wants to break through the bottleneck, it will take time.

Therefore, it is impossible for him to step into the half-step perfection controller realm of the Creation Extreme Realm overnight.

"The Infinite Controller has broken through and reached the half-step Perfect Master, but he has just broken through, and the realm is not stable, and he can't defeat these terrifying creatures at the level of the Half-Step Perfect Master, right?" said another Ten-Realm level master.

"I believe in my little junior brother!"

The Ancient Demon Master said.

I saw Ye Tian step into the encirclement of the creatures at the end of the realm and cast the Devouring Domain.

In an instant, countless creatures at the end of the realm were crushed, and the power on their bodies was absorbed by the Devouring Domain, and the incomparably pure energy was transformed by the Devouring Domain, making Ye Tian's transformation faster and faster.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's will increased rapidly, and the control chains on his body were exercised one by one, and the energy of the chains was integrated into the control body, making Ye Tian's strength increase too fast.

Soon, the dense creatures of the Realm Rim around them, including those powerful creatures at the level of the Ten Realms Master, were all bombarded and killed.

Seeing this scene, the half-step perfect controller-level terrifying giant snake couldn't help it and killed Ye Tian.

【Dark Snake】

This is the name of this giant snake, and it has the strength second only to the top half-step perfect master.

I saw this dark snake smash its tail and shatter many times and spaces, and the tail of the dark snake contained extremely terrifying dark power, as if it could smash through the Origin Realm Sea with a single blow.

Those Ten Realm-level Masters trembled when they saw this terrifying blow.

If they faced this blow, they could only wait for death.

However, Ye Tian smiled slightly, waved his hand, and directly cast the Ten Thousand Dao Blade.

His body has not yet stepped into the realm of the Extreme Creation Realm Half-Step Perfect Controller, and he cannot use the Extreme Creation Ten Thousand Dao Blades, but the top Perfect Control Technique can still burst out with terrifying power.

Coupled with the blessing of other top-notch perfect control techniques, Ye Tian could burst out at this moment with a combat power comparable to that of a top-notch half-step perfect master.

Therefore, under one blow, the body of this dark snake was directly cut off by the Ten Thousand Dao Blade, and it was severely injured with one blow.

"Impossible, you have only broken through to a half-step perfect master, how can you hit me hard?"

The Dark Snake was shocked.

"Let's go, if you give up attacking the Origin Realm Sea, I can make you immortal!"

Ye Tian said.

"Impossible!" said the Dark Snake, "This heaven and earth has ushered in the era of the eternal end, if we occupy it during this period, we may even hope to be promoted to the Perfect Ancestral Beast, you don't want me to give up." No matter how powerful you are, you can't protect this world, and if you want to blame it, you are too wasted in this world, and you haven't even been born with a perfect controller. Otherwise, we wouldn't have come to fight the idea of this eternal world. "

At this time, the big golden bird, that is, the primordial golden light bird, also spoke: "Cultivator, you can cultivate to the top half-step perfect master, you are indeed very talented, but that's all, go away, we can spare your life." "

"Sure enough, you still don't want to give up!"

Ye Tian was not surprised by this.

Before, he didn't know that the Eternal Heaven and Earth would be attacked by the creatures of the Realm's End, but now he knew it for a long time.

Such an eternal heaven and earth similar to the Origin Realm Sea will enter an era called the Eternal End Years after a long time, and the eternal heaven and earth of this era will be very attractive to the creatures of the end of the realm.

Once such a world is destroyed, the creatures of the Ends of the Realm will be able to absorb the substances that are of great help to them from the Eternal Heaven and Earth, thus helping them break the shackles and advance to the level of the Perfect Ancestral Beast, that is, the level of creatures comparable to the level of the Perfect Master.

Of course.

If the crisis of the eternal end years is resisted, the Origin Realm Sea will usher in a period of stability for a long time.

If you want to avoid the arrival of the end of eternity, you can only give birth to a perfect controller in advance, triggering the transformation of the eternal heaven and earth, and the time of the end of eternity will be postponed indefinitely.

It's a pity that although Ye Tian has reached the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, he is still not a perfect controller.

Therefore, even if his body was immediately promoted to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, it would not be able to change the Origin Realm Sea.

So, this battle is inevitable.

"Since this battle is inevitable, let's all come out!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Buzz Buzz!!

A terrifying creature comparable to the half-step perfect controller level appeared and came to Ye Tian's face.

Ten places!

Twenty!

Thirty!

After a while, sixty-six half-step perfect master-level terrifying creatures appeared, and eighteen of them were comparable to the top half-step perfect master-level creatures.

"And your master, won't you come out?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Hearing this, those Ten Realm-level Masters of the Origin Realm Sea trembled.

They felt that the appearance of so many half-step perfect controllers was already extremely terrifying, even if the Ten Elements Ancestors all came back, they would be far from being able to compete!

As a result, there is still a master behind these half-step perfect controller creatures?

"Interesting, you are not weak, you actually perceive our existence!"

A dark ape came out of nothingness, it didn't seem to have much powerful aura in its body, but the moment it appeared, even the primordial golden light bird lowered its head slightly, showing great respect for it.

It can be seen from this that the strength of this ape is terrifying!

And its strength couldn't hide from Ye Tian, it was a creature comparable to the level of a half-step perfect controller.

Then, two more creatures comparable to the top half-step perfect controller appeared.

【Immortal Golden Toad】

【Misty Ghost Peng】

With the addition of the dark ape, this time there were a total of three creatures comparable to the peak half-step perfect controller level, and so many creatures comparable to the half-step perfect controller level.

It can be said that the scale of this time is extremely magnificent, even if the Ten Elements Ancestors are still there, they are not qualified to resist, and they will be pushed sideways in an instant, and they don't even need the Dark Ape, the Immortal Golden Toad, and the Mist Ghost Peng to come forward.

"Okay, it's all out, so since you don't leave, stay here forever!"

Ye Tian's killing intent boiled, filling the surrounding time and space.

And these half-step perfect controller creatures were very puzzled, Ye Tian had just broken through, what qualifications did he have to say such a big thing?
